modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to display non-printing characters in Word.

full_description_text: The user was trying to figure out how to show non-printing characters in Word. They mentioned that they couldn't see these characters and wanted to know how to make them visible. It seems like they were looking for a quick way to toggle this feature on during our call.
short_description: Unable to display non-printing characters in Word.
description: The user was trying to figure out how to show non-printing characters in Word. They mentioned that they couldn't see these characters and wanted to know how to make them visible. It seems like they were looking for a quick way to toggle this feature on during our call.
